name: Golden Mile Resources Limited
summary: Golden Mile Resources Limited engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Australia. It explores for nickel, cobalt, gold, and base metal deposits. The company holds interests in the Leonora East Gold Project, Darlot Gold Project, and the Yuinmery Gold Project in the North-Eastern Goldfields of Western Australia; Ironstone Well Gold Project located to the northeast of the town of Leonora; and Minara Nickel-Cobalt Project to the east of Leonora, as well as Gidgee Project is located in the North-Eastern Goldfields of Western Australia. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
